mapper.select: SELECT * FROM user_style_profile WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND style_tag_id = #{styleTagId}
SELECT * FROM user_style_profile WHERE user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY preference_score DESC LIMIT #{limit}
mapper.update: UPDATE user_style_profile SET preference_score = #{preferenceScore}, interaction_count = #{interactionCount}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND style_tag_id = #{styleTagId}
